channel.title: Adt on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes
channel.description: Recent content in Adt on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes

item.title: Dependent Lists
item.description: Edits Spelling and Grammar In dependently typed languages such as Idris, types can depend on values. This facilitates the construction of rich type-eco-system for reasoning on our software programmes. However, when working with dependently typed values it makes the collection of these values into containers much more interesting. As types depend on a value collecting a set of dependent type into a standard container type means that all items in the container must have the same type.
